message:
🌱 helm: write: broken pipe (#904)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-3480-write-broken-pipe",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: write: broken pipe",
+    "description": "write: broken pipe. This issue affects 83+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your helm deployment:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant helm configuration:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nSince version 2.8.0, I'm getting the following error while running `helm upgrade --install release_name chart`:\n\n`E0209 11:21:52.322201   93759 portforward.go:303] error copying from remote stream to local connection: readfrom tcp4"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for write: broken pipe",
+        "description": "`write: broken pipe` looks like a networking error, where the tunneled connection between helm, kube-proxy and tiller gets interrupted. It's a little difficult to determine where (or what) is interrupting the connection from the error, though, which is coming from kubectl's port-forward APIs.\n\nFor\n```yaml\n$ kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"10\", GitVersion:\"v1.10.0\", GitCommit:\"fc32d2f3698e36b93322a3465f63a14e9f0eaead\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-03-27T00:13:02Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.4\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"darwin/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"9\", GitVersion:\"v1.9.7\", GitCommit:\"dd5e1a2978fd0b97d9b78e1564398aeea7e7fe92\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-04-18T23:58:35Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.3\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\n\n$ helm version\nClient: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.9.0\", GitCommit:\"f6025bb9ee7daf9fee0026541c\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm write: broken pipe is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "`write: broken pipe` looks like a networking error, where the tunneled connection between helm, kube-proxy and tiller gets interrupted. It's a little difficult to determine where (or what) is interrupting the connection from the error, though, which is coming from kubectl's port-forward APIs.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"10\", GitVersion:\"v1.10.0\", GitCommit:\"fc32d2f3698e36b93322a3465f63a14e9f0eaead\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-03-27T00:13:02Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.4\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"darwin/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"9\", GitVersion:\"v1.9.7\", GitCommit:\"dd5e1a2978fd0b97d9b78e1564398aeea7e7fe92\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-04-18T23:58:35Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.3\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\n\n$ helm version\nClient: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.9.0\", GitCommit:\"f6025bb9ee7daf9fee0026541c90a6f557a3e0bc\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}\nServer: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.9.0\", GitCommit:\"f6025bb9ee7daf9fee0026541c90a6f557a3e0bc\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}",
+        "$ kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"10\", GitVersion:\"v1.10.0\", GitCommit:\"fc32d2f3698e36b93322a3465f63a14e9f0eaead\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-03-26T16:55:54Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.3\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"10\", GitVersion:\"v1.10.0\", GitCommit:\"fc32d2f3698e36b93322a3465f63a14e9f0eaead\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2018-03-26T16:44:10Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.9.3\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\n$ helm version\nClient: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.8.2\", GitCommit:\"a80231648a1473929271764b920a8e346f6de844\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}\nServer: &version.Version{SemVer:\"v2.8.2\", GitCommit:\"a80231648a1473929271764b920a8e346f6de844\", GitTreeState:\"clean\"}",
+        "E0531 14:54:27.094118   97288 portforward.go:303] error copying from remote stream to local connection: readfrom tcp4 127.0.0.1:53496->127.0.0.1:53498: write tcp4 127.0.0.1:53496->127.0.0.1:53498: write: broken pipe\nError: UPGRADE FAILED: \"dev\" has no deployed releases"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "helm",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "helm",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with helm installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
